mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_PJT_BASC
(PJT_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR employeeId LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
mapper.update: /* com.kdt.pjt_pjt.mapper.pjt_mng.PjtMngMapper.updatePjtProc */ UPDATE TB_PJT_BASC SET PJT_NM = #{PJT_NM}, employeeId = #{employeeId}, PJT_BGNG_DT = #{PJT_BGNG_DT}, PJT_END_DT = #{PJT_END_DT}, PJT_STTS_CD = #{PJT_STTS_CD}, content = #{content}, ATCH_FILE_SN = #{ATCH_FILE_SN}, ORG_FILE_NM = #{ORG_FILE_NM}, LAST_MDFCN_DT = #{LAST_MDFCN_DT}, TB_PJT_APR = #{TB_PJT_APR}, LAST_MDFR_ID = #{LAST_MDFR_ID} WHERE PJT_SN = #{PJT_SN}
mapper.select:
SELECT PJT_SN, PJT_NM, PJT_STTS_CD, employeeId, USE_YN, FRST_RGTR_ID, FRST_REG_DT, LAST_MDFR_ID, LAST_MDFCN_DT, ATCH_FILE_SN, PJT_BGNG_DT, PJT_END_DT FROM team2_db.TB_PJT_BASC WHERE 1 = 1
AND ( PJT_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR employeeId LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY PJT_SN DESC

SELECT PJT_SN, PJT_NM, PJT_STTS_CD, employeeId, USE_YN, FRST_RGTR_ID, FRST_REG_DT, LAST_MDFR_ID, LAST_MDFCN_DT, ATCH_FILE_SN, ORG_FILE_NM, PJT_BGNG_DT, PJT_END_DT, content FROM team2_db.TB_PJT_BASC WHERE PJT_SN = #{pjtSn}

SELECT PJT_SN, PJT_NM, employeeId, PJT_BGNG_DT, PJT_END_DT, PJT_STTS_CD,
USE_YN, FRST_RGTR_ID, FRST_REG_DT, LAST_MDFR_ID, LAST_MDFCN_DT, ATCH_FILE_SN, ORG_FILE_NM, content FROM team2_db.TB_PJT_BASC ORDER BY PJT_SN ASC

SELECT * FROM team2_db.TB_PJT_BASC
(PJT_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR employeeId LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY
employeeId PJT_BGNG_DT PJT_NM
${order} LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT * FROM TB_PJT_BASC ORDER BY PJT_SN DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT DISTINCT employeeId AS employeeId FROM TB_PJT_BASC WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' AND employeeId IS NOT NULL ORDER BY employeeId

SELECT PJT_SN, PJT_NM, PJT_STTS_CD,
employeeId, TB_PJT_APR, -- ✅ 결재자명 컬럼 USE_YN, FRST_RGTR_ID, FRST_REG_DT, LAST_MDFR_ID, LAST_MDFCN_DT, ATCH_FILE_SN, PJT_BGNG_DT, PJT_END_DT FROM TB_PJT_BASC WHERE PJT_SN = #{pjtSn}
SELECT b.PJT_SN, b.PJT_NM, a.APR_NM AS APPROVER_NAME, -- 결재자명 b.PJT_BGNG_DT FROM TB_PJT_BASC b LEFT JOIN TB_PJT_APR a ON b.PJT_SN = a.PJT_SN WHERE b.PJT_SN = #{pjtSn}
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_PJT_BASC SET TB_PJT_APR = #{TB_PJT_APR}, LAST_MDFCN_DT = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d%H%i%s') WHERE PJT_SN = #{PJT_SN}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_PJT_BASC_VERSION ( original_id, PJT_NM, employeeId, PJT_BGNG_DT, PJT_END_DT, PJT_STTS_CD, content, ATCH_FILE_SN, ORG_FILE_NM, versionName, versionCreatedAt ) SELECT PJT_SN, PJT_NM, employeeId, PJT_BGNG_DT, PJT_END_DT, PJT_STTS_CD, content, ATCH_FILE_SN, ORG_FILE_NM, #{versionName}, NOW() FROM TB_PJT_BASC WHERE PJT_SN = #{pjtSn}
mapper.select: SELECT versionName FROM TB_PJT_BASC_VERSION WHERE original_id = #{pjtSn} ORDER BY versionCreatedAt DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_PJT_BASC WHERE employeeId = #{employeeId} AND USE_YN = 'Y'
